Produce

Achill Fresh Produce

Farm-fresh vegetables, jams, bread & plants from Achill Island

📍 Cashel Market 📍 Keel Market

About Achill Fresh Produce

Achill Fresh Produce is one of the most popular stalls at Achill Island Market. This wonderful farm-fresh stall brings the real taste of Achill Island to the market every week — vegetables grown in island soil, jams made from local fruit, and bread baked with care.

The stall is a celebration of what the land on Achill can produce. From seasonal root vegetables and salad greens to rich homemade jams and preserves, everything is sourced and made locally. They also carry potted plants and herbs — perfect for your garden or windowsill.

Achill Fresh Produce is exactly what a farmers market should be about — real food, grown by real people, sold directly to the community. Come early on market day for the best selection.

What You'll Find

🥕 Fresh Vegetables

Seasonal veg grown on Achill — potatoes, carrots, greens, herbs and more.

🍯 Jams & Preserves

Homemade jams, chutneys and preserves using local fruit and traditional recipes.

🍞 Artisan Bread

Freshly baked artisan bread — soda bread, brown bread and seasonal specials.

🌱 Potted Plants

Herbs, bedding plants and potted flowers to take home from the market.

Achill Island Market

Two locations on Achill Island: Cashel (Wednesdays at Ted's Bar) & Keel (Saturdays).
